title: Help Desk Technician
description:
Palantir's data platforms empower organizations to make better decisions with their data. We serve governments and enterprises globally.

We're seeking a Help Desk Technician to join our Data Analytics team in Palo Alto. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Provide technical support to end users via phone, email, and ticket system
Troubleshoot hardware, software, and network connectivity issues
Manage IT support tickets and track resolution metrics
Document solutions and maintain knowledge base for common issues
Assist with hardware deployment and user onboarding
Escalate complex issues to senior technical staff

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; Associate's degree in IT preferred
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years of help desk or IT support experience
certifications: CompTIA A+, Security+, or vendor certifications preferred
